title_en: The Hit Dark Fantasy Peter Pan Reboot Neverlanders Is Back With an Ambitious Sequel Called Get Lost
summary_en: The hit Peter Pan graphic novel Neverlanders is back with a sequel called Get Lost, and we've got an exclusive preview.
body_en:
The story of Peter Pan has taken many forms across many different media. But in recent years, one of the most memorable takes on the Peter Pan mythos has come in the form of Neverlanders, a YA graphic novel from Injustice: Gods Among Us writer Tom Taylor and TMNT Adventures artist Jon Sommariva. The first volume was a big hit, and the sequel is fast approaching.
IGN can exclusively debut a new preview of Neverlanders: Get Lost. Check it out in the slideshow gallery below:
Here's the official summary for Neverlanders: Get Lost:
Neverlanders: Get Lost is published by Putnam Books, a division of Penguin Random House. The book will be released on August 11, 2026. You can order Neverlanders Vol. 1 and preorder Neverlanders: Get Lost on Amazon.
The original Neverlanders became the first graphic novel to win the prestigious Book of the Year award from the Children’s Book Council of Australia. The series is currently being adapted into a feature film , with Taylor penning the script.
Jesse is a mild-mannered staff writer for IGN. Allow him to lend a machete to your intellectual thicket by following @jschedeen on BlueSky .
